chunks.text: ORDER SHEET I N T HE HI G H CO U R T O F S I N DH B E N C H AT S U K K U R C. P No. D – 1435 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case. 16-09-2025 Mr.Shahzado Dreho, Advocate along with Petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General >>>>>>>>>..<<<<<<<< Mr. Safdar Kamal, Law Officer / NADRA files Authority Letter / Vakalatnama on behalf of Respondent No.7/NADRA along with comments, which are taken on record, copy whereof is provided to learned counsel for the Petitioner. The grievance of petitioner is that his salary was stopped by the Bank officials in compliance of order passed by this Court in C.P No.D- 1318 of 2018 and letter issued by the Senior Superintendent of Police to the NADRA dated 21.10.2019. Counsel for the Petitioner submits that in both the cases wherein the Petitioner was shown as absconder has been acquitted vide order dated 24-04-2024 and judgment dated 19-02-2022, which fact is also admitted by the other side that there is no other criminal case pending against the Petitioner. In the circumstances, we direct the Respondents to release the salaries of the Petitioner so also unblock his CNIC and release the amount whatsoever available in the Account of the Petitioner. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms. A copy of this order be provided to the Respondents as well as learned Additional AG for compliance. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
